channel.title: NSA on Jens Rantil
channel.description: Recent content in NSA on Jens Rantil

item.title: How to (partially) declassify NSA documents
item.description: The day before Christmas Eve, the (American) NSA published a bunch of declassified reports that have been handed to the President’s Intelligence Oversight Board (IOD) for the past 10 years or so. I quickly scrolled through a couple of documents to find a lot of heavily redacted text: The idea Link to heading What struck me was that what most of the redacted text that I think the public (and me) are interested in is the magnitude of NSA surveillance, namely how large the redacted numbers are.
